mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO public.lostark_calendar_schedules ( id, week_start_date, week_end_date, category_name, contents_name, contents_icon, min_item_level, location, start_time_kst, start_date, start_hhmm, slot_hhmm, rewards, raw_content, is_active ) VALUES
( CAST(#{item.id} AS uuid), #{item.weekStartDate}, #{item.weekEndDate}, #{item.categoryName}, #{item.contentsName}, #{item.contentsIcon}, #{item.minItemLevel}, #{item.location}, #{item.startTimeKst}, #{item.startDate}, #{item.startHhmm}, #{item.slotHhmm}, CAST(#{item.rewards} AS jsonb), CAST(#{item.rawContent} AS jsonb), #{item.isActive} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, week_start_date, week_end_date, category_name, contents_name, contents_icon, min_item_level, location, start_time_kst, start_date, start_hhmm, slot_hhmm, rewards, raw_content, is_active, created_at, updated_at FROM public.lostark_calendar_schedules WHERE is_active = true AND start_date = #{date} ORDER BY slot_hhmm, category_name, start_time_kst

SELECT id, week_start_date, week_end_date, category_name, contents_name, contents_icon, min_item_level, location, start_time_kst, start_date, start_hhmm, slot_hhmm, rewards, raw_content, is_active, created_at, updated_at FROM public.lostark_calendar_schedules WHERE is_active = true ORDER BY start_date, slot_hhmm, category_name, start_time_kst
